ab: Haip tu qani’anan, dasun saam masnanava munhaan sasaipukan takismumuut, ihaan saam hilav maldailaz baliv kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Maaq tu mukumbu’in saam a, tupa masnanava tu,” Antanngaus qai saipukan qazam, antanhiku qai saipukan ivut, anaka amin amu saduduu."
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Mapising saak ivut, paaqpun nii saak saduu ivut.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Sinaduu’in saak madia tu qazam, ihaan aingka lukis daza kusbabai, haiza tuquu ihaan lukis tu luak malsasabaq.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: Haiza ihaan sasaipukan takismumuut kumbu zuu, tas’asikis siin lai’iung, nii saak sinaduu maupata tu takismumuut. Manahip is’aang tu sinaduu’in haip tu qani’anan.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Siniza’in saak madia tu qaningu, ispasaduu inaak tu tama tina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Maaki muqnin a, nataskun saak tama tina mun’ita.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
